title: armeria maritima var. cutandiana
intro: Armeria maritima var. cutandiana, also known as sea thrift, is a perennial plant belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of sea thrift include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
